home.hero_subtitle: Where natural texture becomes the ultimate expression of accomplished luxury.
home.hero_description: For over ten years, Elsa Coiffure has been redefining Afro hair art. Each crown we sculpt is a unique piece, blending ancestral techniques with avant-garde silhouettes. More than a hairstyle, it is a legacy of elegance that we celebrate.
home.bridal_subtitle: Exquisite bridal styling for the modern woman. Discover our curated wedding packages designed to make your natural crown shine.
home.bridal_card_desc: Crafting sculptural silhouettes that bring a contemporary edge to bridal elegance.
home.curated_title: Expertly curated by the Elsa Coiffure team daily.
home.curated_desc: Every product in our boutique is tested and used in our salon. We stand by the efficacy of every ingredient.

about.founded_text: Founded on the belief that natural texture is the ultimate luxury, Elsa Coiffure has redefined Afro hair artistry for over a decade. Our journey began with a single vision: to create a sanctuary where heritage meets high-fashion.
about.masterpiece_text: Every crown we style is a masterpiece. From intricate traditional techniques to modern avant-garde silhouettes, we blend technical excellence with a deep understanding of natural hair health. We don't just style hair; we celebrate a legacy of elegance and self-expression.
about.bridal_desc: Celebrate your most beautiful day with artisanal bridal styling. We specialize in sophisticated natural updos and cultural silhouettes for the modern bride.
about.traditional_desc: Cultural heritage woven into sophisticated styles.
about.modern_desc: Sculptural silhouettes with a contemporary edge.
about.veil_desc: Artful integration of veils into natural textures.
about.natural_desc: Celebrating your unique texture with gold-standard care.
about.unique_bride: Every bride is unique. Inquire today for a personalized wedding consultation and discovery session.
